title: Atlanta One Love Reggae Music Fest
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park - Birth of Atlanta Lot, 1660 Johnson Road NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: Inaugural festival featuring Reggae, Soca, Dancehall & Afrobeat with world-class artists, authentic food vendors, art & jewelry, games, and picture booths. Perfect for couples who love music and culture.

title: Soul Train Live Music Cookout
location: Historic Fourth Ward Park, 695 Morgan Street, Atlanta, GA
description: Live tribute concert honoring Soul Train with tributes to James Brown, Marvin Gaye, Prince, Aretha Franklin, Michael Jackson, Lauryn Hill, and more. Outdoor cookout vibes in a beautiful park setting. Great for couples who love R&B and funk.

title: TUMBAO Dance Social - 2 Rooms Salsa & Bachata
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Monthly dance social with two rooms - Salsa Room and Bachata Room. Features performance by Kiara, complimentary Salsa On2 class at 9:30 PM. BYOB. Perfect date night for couples who love to dance or want to learn!

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Plant-based nightlife event featuring Atlanta's top vegan chefs, food trucks, craft cocktails, zero-proof mocktails, live DJs, fashion & art showcases. Great for couples - whether vegan or curious!

title: Whitney Cummings
location: Center Stage Theater, 1374 W. Peachtree St. NW, Atlanta, GA 30309
description: Comedian, actress, and podcast host of 'Good for You' performs stand-up. Known for NBC's 'Whitney' and co-creating '2 Broke Girls'. Perfect couples' night out for comedy fans.

title: Helium Presents: Guy Torry
price: $90 couple's package with food & beverage credit
description: Phat Comedy Tuesdays founder and Kings of Comedy tour host performs stand-up. Special couples package includes 2 premium seats plus $45 food & beverage credit per person. Great date night deal!

title: Gordon Parks 'The South in Color' Exhibit
description: 70th anniversary exhibition featuring 40+ photographs from Gordon Parks' iconic 'The South in Color' series. A powerful exploration of life in the Jim Crow South. Perfect for couples who appreciate art and history.

title: ULTRARUIN Exhibition
description: Photography exhibition exploring themes of decay and renewal. Great for couples interested in contemporary photography and visual arts.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language
description: Group exhibition exploring language through embodied experiences. Perfect for couples who enjoy thought-provoking contemporary art.

title: Spring Awakening 2026
location: Grandview Avenue Gallery, 2979 Grandview Avenue, Atlanta, GA 30305
description: Atlanta Artists Center presents juried exhibition featuring emerging artists. Great for couples exploring Atlanta's vibrant art scene.

title: Bachata X Zouk ATL Weekender
description: Three-day dance festival featuring Bachata and Zouk workshops, socials, and performances. Perfect for couples into Latin dancing or looking to explore a new dance style together.

title: Atlanta Veg Week Kickoff Party
description: Kickoff celebration for Atlanta's annual Veg Week featuring plant-based food, networking, and activities. Great for couples exploring vegetarian/vegan lifestyle.
